statement: In every magma, Equation 878 (`x = y * ((x * x) * (z * w))`) implies Equation 3784 (`x * y = (y * z) * (w * u)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0099
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op (op x x) (op z w)))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x y) = (op (op y z) (op w u))
